<div id="site-content">

<div id="pages-container">

<div id="tpl-government" class="page">

<div class="page__inner">

<div id="government">

<div class="o-background">

</div>

<div class="o-foreground">

</div>

<div class="o-container">

<div id="gov-hero" class="section">

<div class="o-grid">

<div id="gov-hero__content">

<span id="gov-hero__label" class="o-label">Government</span>

# Multiplied engineering capacity for government.

An AI software engineering platform built for the complexity of
government codebases — from legacy modernization to new development.

<div id="gov-hero__badges">

<span class="gov-hero__badge">FedRAMP High</span>
<span class="gov-hero__badge">GovCloud</span>
<span class="gov-hero__badge gov-hero__badge--security">On-Prem &
Air-Gapped Deployments</span>
<span class="gov-hero__badge gov-hero__badge--security">Zero Data
Retention</span>
<span class="gov-hero__badge gov-hero__badge--security">ITAR, DoD
IL4/5/6 Compliance</span>

</div>

</div>

<div id="gov-hero__cta">

<a href="contact.html" class="gov-hero__cta-btn">Contact Sales</a>
<a href="mailto:public.sector@cognition.ai"
class="gov-hero__cta-email">public.sector@cognition.ai</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="gov-logos" class="section">

## Used by the World's Most Complex Organizations

<div id="gov-logos__grid" class="logo-grid-wrapper o-grid">

<div class="logo-grid">

<div class="logo-grid-item">

<div id="gov-uc-understand" class="section gov-usecase">

<div class="o-grid">

<div class="gov-usecase__text">

<span class="gov-usecase__label o-label">Documentation</span>

## Understand what you've inherited.

Auto-generated documentation and system diagrams for legacy codebases —
full visibility into systems your team didn't build.

<div class="gov-usecase__chips">

COBOL .NET C/C++ Assembly Fortran PL/I Perl Java

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__stat">

<span class="gov-usecase__stat-value">1M+</span>
<span class="gov-usecase__stat-label">repos documented</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__visual">

<img src="assets/images/screenshot-deepwiki.png" loading="lazy"
alt="DeepWiki generating documentation for a legacy codebase" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="gov-uc-modernize" class="section gov-usecase">

<div class="o-grid">

<div class="gov-usecase__text">

<span class="gov-usecase__label o-label">Update Legacy Code</span>

## Modernize at scale.

Large-scale language migrations and framework upgrades across every
repository in parallel. Full auditability at every step.

<div class="gov-usecase__stat">

<span class="gov-usecase__stat-value">5–40x</span>
<span class="gov-usecase__stat-label">faster modernization and
migration</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__visual">

<img src="assets/images/windsurf-modernize.png" loading="lazy"
alt="Windsurf modernizing a C++ codebase" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="gov-uc-security" class="section gov-usecase">

<div class="o-grid">

<div class="gov-usecase__text">

<span class="gov-usecase__label o-label">Security</span>

## Remediate and harden.

Automated vulnerability remediation across existing scanners at scale.
Code review, test generation, and incident response hardening every
stage of the SDLC.

<div class="gov-usecase__chips">

Snyk Veracode SonarQube Fortify Checkmarx

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__subsections">

<div class="gov-usecase__sub">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="gov-usecase__sub-icon" />

### PR Review

Automated code review catches bugs and security issues before merge.

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__sub">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="gov-usecase__sub-icon" />

### Test Generation

Unit, integration, and QA tests generated across the entire codebase.

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__sub">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="gov-usecase__sub-icon" />

### Incident Management

Automated triage, root-cause analysis, and fix generation for production
issues.

</div>

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__stat">

<span class="gov-usecase__stat-value">70–90%</span>
<span class="gov-usecase__stat-label">of security vulnerabilities
remediated</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="gov-usecase__visual">

<img src="assets/images/screenshot-windsurf-testing.png" loading="lazy"
alt="Windsurf unit testing screenshot" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="gov-certs" class="section">

<div class="o-grid">

<span id="gov-certs__label" class="o-label">Security & Compliance</span>

## built for federal.

</div>

<div class="o-grid">

<div id="gov-certs__table">

<div class="gov-certs__header">

<span class="gov-certs__header-label"></span>
<span class="gov-certs__header-col">Windsurf<span class="gov-certs__header-caption">AI
IDE</span></span>
<span class="gov-certs__header-col">Devin<span class="gov-certs__header-caption">Autonomous
Agent</span></span>

</div>

<div class="gov-certs__row">

<span class="gov-certs__row-label">FedRAMP</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--text">FedRAMP
High</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--pending">In
Progress</span>

</div>

<div class="gov-certs__row">

<span class="gov-certs__row-label">SOC 2 Type II</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--yes">✓</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--yes">✓</span>

</div>

<div class="gov-certs__row">

<span class="gov-certs__row-label">DoD Impact Levels</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--text">IL4 / IL5
/ IL6</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--pending">In
Progress</span>

</div>

<div class="gov-certs__row">

<span class="gov-certs__row-label">ITAR</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--yes">✓</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--pending">In
Progress</span>

</div>

<div class="gov-certs__row">

<span class="gov-certs__row-label">Zero Data Retention</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--yes">✓</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--pending">In
Progress</span>

</div>

<div class="gov-certs__row">

<span class="gov-certs__row-label">On-Prem & Air-Gapped
Deployments</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--yes">✓</span>
<span class="gov-certs__row-check gov-certs__row-check--pending">In
Progress</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="gov-why" class="section">

<div class="o-grid">

<span id="gov-why__label" class="o-label">Differentiators</span>

## why government teams choose cognition

</div>

<div class="o-grid">

<div id="gov-why__grid">

<div class="gov-why-card">

### Best model for every task; no lock-in

- Model-agnostic architecture across the full platform
- Runs on customer-approved model endpoints only
- No vendor lock-in

</div>

<div class="gov-why-card">

### Frontier AI engineering expertise, on-site

- Dedicated engineers from top-tier technology and defense companies
- Embedded support from acquisition through deployment
- Executive AI strategy, engineering training, and ROI measurement
  throughout

</div>

<div class="gov-why-card">

### Zero Data Retention & Full Auditability

- Strict ZDR — codebase and data never remotely stored or trained on
- No "black box" deployments — verifiable action trails for agency
  security and compliance audits

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="gov-news" class="section">

<div class="o-grid">

<span id="gov-news__label" class="o-label">News</span>

## latest from cognition

</div>
